<?php namespace Barryvdh\Debugbar\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\Response; class CacheController extends BaseController { /** * Forget a cache key * */ public function delete($key, $tags = '') { $cache = app('cache'); if (!empty($tags)) { $tags = json_decode($tags, true); $cache = $cache->tags($tags); } else { unset($tags); } $success = $cache->forget($key); return response()->json(compact('success')); } }
